items.description: Crash on I-80 westbound between 4.3 miles east of Exit 45: PA 478 - ELMENTON/ST PETERSBURG and 3.5 miles east of Exit 45: PA 478 - ELMENTON/ST PETERSBURG. There is a lane restriction.
